name: the GCTP handoff names the universal config object and the persisted, cached options-view
command: grep -q '§28.58 universal config object' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && grep -q '§28.59 persisted, cached options-view' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && grep -q 'config-sync.sh' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && echo handoff-config 1>&2
